segments.title: Hardest climb
segments.summary: Main sustained climbing load before the late technical section.

segments.title: Fastest descent
segments.summary: Peak free speed on the route.

segments.title: Highest point
segments.summary: Highest elevation reached during the activity.

segments.title: Best fueling window
segments.summary: Ideal intake window before the hardest climb.

insights.title: Late ride fueling pressure
insights.description: Fuel risk rises sharply before the hardest climb. A carb intake 10–15 minutes earlier would have protected this section better.

insights.title: Speed drop explained by terrain
insights.description: The slowdown here lines up with grade and terrain rather than poor pacing alone.

insights.title: Probable depletion zone
insights.description: This section combines accumulated time, climbing load, and low remaining glycogen estimate.
